title: 7 Large-Cap Stocks to Buy on the Dip
text: Following this year's sell-off, seasoned investors are increasingly hunting for large-cap stocks to buy on the dip. For instance, the S&P 500 index and Dow Jones Industrial Average have lost 185 and 13% so far in 2022.

title: 1 Conglomerate Stock You'll Be Happy You Own In 2032
text: There's life after COVID-19 for Danaher, and the stock has a long pathway of growth ahead of it.

title: Beckman Coulter Partners with Mass General and BARDA to Identify Severe Pediatric Infections in Emergency Departments
text: BREA, Calif. , July 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Beckman Coulter, global leader in advanced diagnostics, today announced that it will partner with Massachusetts General Hospital to validate the use of the novel Monocyte Distribution Width (MDW) hematology biomarker in rapid identification of children presenting with early signs of severe illness from infection.

title: Tesla, Danaher And Some Other Big Gainers From Yesterday
text: U.S. stocks closed higher on Thursday, with the Nasdaq Composite jumping around 1.4%. Here is the list of some big stocks recording gains in the previous session.

title: Danaher is on the verge of breakout as RBC analysts make a big call
text: “Defensive” and “high quality” is what RBC Capital Markets called Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) stock. In a note on Wednesday, RBC said that Danaher's leverage of only 1.7 times makes the stock attractive.

title: Danaher's (DHR) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Beat, Increase Y/Y
text: Danaher's (DHR) second-quarter 2022 revenues increase 7.4% year over year, driven by an impressive performance across its segments.

title: Danaher Corporation's (DHR) CEO Rainer Blair on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 21, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants John Bedford – Vice President-Investor Relations Rainer Blair – President and Chief Executive Officer Matt McGrew – Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Rainer Blair – Bank of America Vijay Kumar – Evercore ISI Scott Davis – Melius Research Dan Brennan – Cowen Jack Meehan – Nephron Rachel Vatnsdal – JPMorgan Patrick Donnelly – Citi Operator My name is Gretchen and I will be your conference facilitator this morning. At this time, I would like to welcome everyone to the Danaher Corporation's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Results Conference Call.

title: Danaher (DHR) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Danaher (DHR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 17.45% and 6.35%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Danaher Easily Beats Q2 Street View With Growth From Base Business; FY22 Outlook Unchanged
text: Danaher Corp (NYSE: DHR) has logged Q2 FY22 adjusted EPS of $2.76, up 12% Y/Y, surpassing the estimate of $2.35. Sales increased 7.5% to $7.75 billion, with 9.5% non-GAAP core and 8.0% non-GAAP base business core revenue growth, beating the $7.32 billion estimate.

title: Danaher Reports Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: WASHINGTON, D.C. , July 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR) (the "Company") today announced results for the second quarter 2022.

title: Will Cost Headwinds Dampen Danaher's (DHR) Q2 Earnings?
text: While impressive segmental performances are expected to have aided Danaher's (DHR) Q2 performance, high costs might have impeded the bottom line.

title: HTHIY vs. DHR: Which Stock Should Value Investors Buy Now?

title: Danaher: A Much-Needed Pullback
text: Danaher is a Dividend Challenger with 8 consecutive years of dividend growth. Shares currently yield 0.39%. Danaher is aggressive with M&A announcing 10 acquisitions totaling more than $10 B in 2021.
